children.name: requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/v1/auth/verification/': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/v1/auth/verification/?
GET /api/v1/account/seller/ - next page link is valid (authenticated)
GET /api/v1/account/seller/ - response time is under 2 seconds (authenticated)

GET /api/v1/account/seller/ - response time is under 2 seconds (authenticated)
GET /api/v1/account/seller/announcement/own/ - response time is under 2 seconds

GET /api/v1/account/user/me/ - verify user id is positive
GET /api/v1/account/user/me/ - response time is under 2 seconds
PATCH /api/v1/account/user/update/number/ - response time is under 2 seconds
PATCH /api/v1/account/user/update/phone/ - success returns 200 with empty body
PATCH /api/v1/account/user/update/phone/ - response time is under 2 seconds
POST /api/v1/announcement/{id}/update/status/ - response time is under 2 seconds
POST /api/v1/announcement/report/{id}/ - response time is under 2 seconds
GET /api/v1/announcement/report/ - empty list is valid response
GET /api/v1/announcement/report/ - response time is under 2 seconds
POST /api/v1/chat/message/{room_id}/ - new message is_read is false
POST /api/v1/chat/message/{room_id}/ - response time is under 2 seconds
GET /api/v1/chat/message/{room_id}/ - empty list is valid response
GET /api/v1/chat/message/{room_id}/ - response time is under 2 seconds
PATCH /api/v1/chat/message/{room_id}/read-all/ - response time is under 2 seconds

GET /api/v1/chat/message/unread-count/ - response time is under 2 seconds
GET /api/v1/chat/room/ - verify room object fields and types
GET /api/v1/chat/room/ - empty list is valid response
GET /api/v1/chat/room/ - response time is under 2 seconds
GET /api/v1/dictionary/country/ - verify country object fields and types
GET /api/v1/dictionary/country/ - response time is under 2 seconds
GET /api/v1/dictionary/district/?region=1 - verify district object fields and types
GET /api/v1/dictionary/district/?region=1 - all district ids are unique
GET /api/v1/dictionary/district/ - missing region param returns empty list or 400
GET /api/v1/dictionary/district/?region=999999 - invalid region returns empty list or 404
GET /api/v1/dictionary/district/?region=1 - response time is under 2 seconds
GET /api/v1/dictionary/info/ - response time is under 2 seconds
GET /api/v1/dictionary/region/?country=15 - verify region object fields and types
GET /api/v1/dictionary/region/?country=15 - code starts with country iso_code
GET /api/v1/dictionary/region/ - missing country param returns empty list or 400
GET /api/v1/dictionary/region/?country=999999 - invalid country returns empty list
GET /api/v1/dictionary/region/?country=15 - response time is under 2 seconds
POST /api/v1/notification/device/ - verify response matches request payload
POST /api/v1/notification/device/ - response time is under 2 seconds
GET /api/v1/notification/notification/ - empty list is valid response
GET /api/v1/notification/notification/ - response time is under 2 seconds
PATCH /api/v1/notification/notification/read-all/ - response time is under 2 seconds
GET /api/v1/notification/notification/unread-count/ - response time is under 2 seconds
POST /api/v1/auth/token/refresh/ - success with valid refresh token
POST /api/v1/auth/token/refresh/ - new access token is a valid JWT
POST /api/v1/auth/token/refresh/ - response time is under 2 seconds
GET /api/v1/announcement/ - pagination field types are valid

AssertionError: Expected 'not_authenticated' message_key, Got: {'message': 'Token is invalid or expired', 'message_key': 'token_not_valid', 'errors': {'detail': 'Given token not valid for any token type', 'code': 'token_not_valid', 'messages': "{'token_class': ErrorDetail(string='AccessToken', code='token_not_valid'), 'token_type': ErrorDetail(string='access', code='token_not_valid'), 'message': ErrorDetail(string='Token is invalid', code='token_not_valid')}"}, 'exception_class': 'InvalidToken'}
assert ('token_not_valid' == 'not_authenticated'
  
  - not_authenticated
  + token_not_valid or 'not_authenticated' in '')
 +  where '' = str('')
 +    where '' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7f5249449a40>('detail', '')
 +      where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7f5249449a40> = {'errors': {'code': 'token_not_valid', 'detail': 'Given token not valid for any token type', 'messages': "{'token_class': ErrorDetail(string='AccessToken', code='token_not_valid'), 'token_type': ErrorDetail(string='access', code='token_not_valid'), 'message': ErrorDetail(string='Token is invalid', code='token_not_valid')}"}, 'exception_class': 'InvalidToken', 'message': 'Token is invalid or expired', 'message_key': 'token_not_valid'}.get

AssertionError: pricing.price should be number
assert False
 +  where False = isinstance('36594400.00', (<class 'int'>, <class 'float'>))
